yaml_definition:
name: list_orders
description: Retrieve a list of orders with optional filtering by order name, ID, user, or date
method: GET
url: /api/orders
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: 订单名称 - Filter by order name
      in: query
    id:
      type: string
      description: 订单ID - Filter by order ID
      in: query
    user:
      type: string
      description: 下单人 - Filter by the person who placed the order
      in: query
    date:
      type: string
      description: 下单时间 - Filter by order date (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
      in: query
  required: []
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: array
      description: List of orders matching the query
      items:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            description: Unique order identifier
          name:
            type: string
            description: Order/product name
          user:
            type: string
            description: Person who placed the order
          amount:
            type: integer
            description: Order amount in currency units
          status:
            type: string
            description: Order status (paid, shipped, pending, cancelled)
          time:
            type: string
            description: Order date
    total:
      type: integer
      description: Total number of orders matching the query
validation_errors:
YAML parse error: mapping values are not allowed here
  in "<unicode string>", line 22, column 55:
     ... 间 - Filter by order date (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
                                         ^
